name: discord
description: Send deploy notifications to Discord and register slash commands
author: ImJustRicky

config.label: Discord Channel ID
config.hint: Enable Developer Mode, right-click channel > Copy Channel ID

config.label: Discord Application ID
config.hint: discord.com/developers/applications > Your App > General > Application ID (for slash commands)

config.label: Discord Server (Guild) ID
config.hint: Right-click server name > Copy Server ID (for slash commands)
